description_long: This is a detached residential house set within a walled lot, surrounded by lush landscaping and blooming trees, likely cherry blossoms. The house features a symmetrical facade with a prominent central entryway, flanked by large bay windows and a small porch. The property is enclosed by high white walls, with a driveway leading up to the house and a backdrop of scenic murals depicting an urban park or neighborhood. The roof is hipped, and the house appears to have two stories, with a balanced arrangement of windows on both levels. The landscaping is meticulously arranged, with trees and shrubs providing privacy and aesthetic appeal, while the driveway and entry path are clearly defined.
description: A two-story detached house with a hipped roof, bay windows, and a central entryway, set within a walled lot with lush landscaping and a driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, bay windows, and lush landscaping with blooming trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, side wall, and additional trees along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, more trees, and the enclosing walls with scenic murals.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the driveway, side wall, and the arrangement of trees along the perimeter.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with steps, small porch, and decorative columns flanked by bay windows
